description: FP regression-guard: `regex.exec(args)` is RegExp.prototype.exec, NOT child_process.exec. v0181 first-application battle-test surfaced this on AEGIS's own mass-assignment-checker. Negative-lookbehind `(?<!\.)` excludes method-call shapes; bare `exec(` is no longer detected (too ambiguous), only the explicit `child_process.exec(` namespace fires. persistence-pattern-checker MUST NOT fire CWE-506.
